markdown:
#  Create RFIs on a Drawing (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool on your Android mobile device.
  2. Search and filter for the drawing to which you want to add an RFI.
  3. Tap the drawing you want to add an RFI to.
  4. In the markup toolbar, tap the shape or line you want to add. See [Mark up a Drawing (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-android).
  5. Place the markup shape or line in the drawing.
  6. Tap **Link**.
  7. Tap **RFIs**.
  8. Tap the **Plus**![Icon Plus Quick Create Mobile2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a27be202634839c76584fe365cc247fb/1c03472023e1b0974c6f7b58a4235d9d/icon-plus-quick-create-mobile2.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon.
  9. Enter the appropriate information into the RFI form. See [Create RFIs (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-android/tutorials/create-an-rfi-android).
  10. Tap **Save**.
  11. To publish, select the hand icon, tap the markup, and tap **Publish**. See [What is the difference between personal and published drawing markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)


## See Also
  * [Link Items to a Drawing (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/link-items-to-a-drawing-android)
  * [Drawings (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/permissions)
  * [Which tools currently support the Bookmarks feature on the Procore mobile app?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-tools-currently-support-the-bookmarks-feature-on-the-procore-mobile-app)
title: Create RFIs on a Drawing (Android)
description: How to create an RFI on drawings on an Android mobile device.
